tender.source_title: Compact switchboard supply for district heating substation retrofit

notice_text: Open request for supply of compact low-voltage switchboards for a district heating substation retrofit with staged delivery and standard acceptance documentation.
technical_specification_text: Supply compact low-voltage switchboards, factory test documents, labeling set, warranty package, and staged delivery to one municipal site with commissioning support.
contract_draft_text: Draft contract includes staged payment, delivery timeline obligations, standard penalty clauses for delay, and acceptance by customer commission after document handover.
why_relevant: This is a realistic relevant pilot case for a straightforward electrical-equipment tender with moderate contractual review load and clear operator value.
participant_requirements: Confirm conformity of switchboard configuration to customer scope.
Provide warranty commitment and technical passport package.
sample_supplier_questions: Is staged delivery to one site acceptable in two truckloads?
Which exact FAT protocol must accompany shipment?
Are equivalent enclosure dimensions allowed if electrical parameters match?

expected_decision_notes.operator_guidance: Likely acceptable for pilot demonstration after standard contract and document review.
